6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/bolliy/ioBroker.sun2000/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/bolliy/ioBroker.sun2000/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/bolliy/ioBroker.sun2000/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
